data_processing: Cellranger v7.0.0 was used to align and count FASTQ reads (including aligning TCR sequences using cellranger multi)
The count matrices were imported for downstream analysis into R using the Seurat (v4.3.0) package. Cells were called from barcodes using the Seurat R package
Count normalization, integration, and clustering was performed using Seurat
Assembly: GRCh38
Assembly: cellranger-vdj-GRCh38-alts-ensembl-7.1.0 (downloaded from 10x Genomics website)
Supplementary files format and content: CG_raw_feature_bc_matrix.tar: Tar file of count/feature matrices (raw_feature_bc_matrix) output from Cellranger
Supplementary files format and content: TCR_contigs.tar: Tar of raw TCR alignments (all_contig_annotations) output from Cellranger
Supplementary files format and content: CG_Seurat_metadata.csv: Comma-separated values of Seurat object metadata with cell annotations/clusters

Cellranger v7.0.0 was used to align and count FASTQ reads (including aligning TCR sequences using cellranger multi)
The count matrices were imported for downstream analysis into R using the Seurat (v4.3.0) package. Cells were called from barcodes using the Seurat R package
Count normalization, integration, and clustering was performed using Seurat
Assembly: GRCh38
